title: Calculate SGPA/CGPA with percentage input and subject add/remove
description: Verifies a student can add subjects, enter percentage-based scores with credits, remove a row, and calculate SGPA/CGPA successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /calculator
Add new subjects to the list
Fill Subject 1 name with Calculus
Fill Subject 1 credits field with 4
Fill Subject 1 score field with 85
Add a second subject to the list
Fill Subject 2 name with Physics
Fill Subject 2 credits field with 3
Fill Subject 2 score field with 78
Remove the second subject from the list
Submit calculation
Verify SGPA and CGPA results are displayed

title: Calculate SGPA/CGPA using grade points mode
description: Verifies a student can switch to grade points input, enter credits and grade points, and calculate SGPA/CGPA successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /calculator
Add new subjects to the list
Toggle input mode from percentage to grade points
Fill Subject 1 name with Data Structures
Fill Subject 1 credits field with 4
Fill Subject 1 grade points field with 9
Add a second subject to the list
Fill Subject 2 name with Discrete Math
Fill Subject 2 credits field with 3
Fill Subject 2 grade points field with 8
Submit calculation
Verify SGPA and CGPA results are displayed

title: Save a calculated result to the dashboard
description: Verifies a student can calculate results and save them so a save confirmation is shown and the record appears in the dashboard history.

steps.description: Navigate to /calculator
Add new subjects to the list
Fill Subject 1 name with Operating Systems
Fill Subject 1 credits field with 4
Fill Subject 1 score field with 81
Submit calculation
Save results to dashboard
Click the navigation to open the dashboard
Verify the saved calculations history includes the newly saved record
Verify dashboard charts reflect the presence of saved calculation data

title: Generate a semester plan to reach a target CGPA
description: Verifies a student can enter current standing and a higher target CGPA with remaining semesters and receive per-semester SGPA targets as output.

steps.description: Navigate to /planner
Fill a valid current CGPA into the current CGPA field
Fill a valid number into the completed credits field
Fill a valid higher target CGPA into the target CGPA field
Select a valid number of remaining semesters
Generate the plan
Verify per-semester SGPA targets are displayed

title: Browse saved calculations and inspect a past record detail
description: Verifies a student can browse saved calculation history and open a past calculation to view its detailed breakdown.

steps.description: Navigate to /calculator
Add new subjects to the list
Fill Subject 1 name with Algorithms
Fill Subject 1 credits field with 4
Fill Subject 1 score field with 88
Submit calculation
Save results to dashboard
Click the navigation to open the dashboard
Select a saved calculation from the history list
Verify a detailed breakdown view for the selected calculation is displayed

title: Add and save a semester record and see the trend update
description: Verifies a student can add a semester with SGPA and credits, save it, and the trend visualization updates to include the new record.

steps.description: Navigate to /multi-semester
Start adding a new semester record
Fill a valid semester identifier into the semester field if required
Fill a valid credits value into the credits field
Fill a valid SGPA value into the SGPA field
Save the semester record
Verify the trend chart includes the newly added semester record

title: View charts and trend summaries for saved calculations
description: Verifies the dashboard renders charts and trend summaries when saved calculations exist.

steps.description: Navigate to /calculator
Add new subjects to the list
Fill Subject 1 name with Database Systems
Fill Subject 1 credits field with 3
Fill Subject 1 score field with 74
Submit calculation
Save results to dashboard
Navigate to /dashboard
Verify charts and trend summaries are displayed for saved calculations

title: Build a multi-semester trend with multiple records
description: Verifies a power-user can add multiple semester records sequentially and the chart and summary statistics reflect the growing history.

steps.description: Navigate to /multi-semester
Start adding a new semester record
Fill valid credits and SGPA values for the first semester
Save the semester record
Start adding a second semester record
Fill valid credits and SGPA values for the second semester
Save the semester record
Verify summary statistics and the trend chart reflect multiple semesters

title: Generate guidance when target CGPA is lower than current CGPA
description: Verifies a student can set a target CGPA below their current CGPA and the planner returns appropriate maintain/improve guidance without requiring unrealistic targets.

steps.description: Navigate to /planner
Fill a valid current CGPA into the current CGPA field
Fill a valid number into the completed credits field
Fill a valid lower target CGPA into the target CGPA field
Select a valid number of remaining semesters
Generate the plan
Verify advisory guidance is displayed for the lower target scenario

title: Generate required grades for an upcoming semester to reach a target CGPA
description: Verifies that a student can input current CGPA, upcoming credits, and a target CGPA and receive a per-course required grade prediction output.

steps.description: Navigate to /predictor
Fill a valid current CGPA into the current CGPA field
Fill a valid upcoming semester credits value into the upcoming credits field
Fill a valid target CGPA into the target CGPA field
Generate the grade predictions
Verify a per-course required grades result is displayed

title: Run backlog impact scan and review remediation priorities
description: Verifies a student can add backlog items, run the scan, and see a prioritized risk assessment and remediation suggestions.

steps.description: Navigate to /backlog
Add a backlog or failed course item
Fill a valid credits value for the backlog item
Fill a valid grade status or outcome for the backlog item if required
Run the backlog impact scan
Verify a prioritized remediation list and a CGPA impact/projection output are displayed

title: Browse existing semester records to view trend and summary
description: Verifies the multi-semester page displays the list of recorded semesters along with trend visualization and summary statistics.

steps.description: Navigate to /multi-semester
Scroll through the semester records section if needed
Verify a trend visualization and summary statistics are displayed

title: Compare feasibility by lowering target CGPA and regenerating predictions
description: Verifies that lowering the target CGPA and regenerating updates the displayed required grade predictions to reflect the new target.

steps.description: Navigate to /predictor
Fill a valid current CGPA into the current CGPA field
Fill a valid upcoming semester credits value into the upcoming credits field
Fill a valid target CGPA into the target CGPA field
Generate the grade predictions
Adjust the target CGPA downward to a lower valid value
Regenerate the grade predictions
Verify the required grades results update to reflect the lower target

title: Update retake plan and rerun scan to change projection
description: Verifies a student can modify retake plan inputs and rerun the scan to see the projected impact update.

steps.description: Navigate to /backlog
Add a backlog or failed course item
Fill a valid credits value for the backlog item
Run the backlog impact scan
Update the retake plan details or credits assumptions
Run the backlog impact scan again
Verify the displayed projection or risk assessment changes after updating the retake plan

title: Navigate from home to a tool page
description: Verifies a student can discover available tools on the landing page and navigate into a selected tool successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the section that lists the available tools
Click a tool card to open that tool
Verify the selected tool page is displayed

title: Show inline validation when a subject grade is missing
description: Verifies the calculator prevents submission and shows inline validation errors when a subject grade field is left empty.

steps.description: Navigate to /calculator
Add new subjects to the list
Fill Subject 1 name with Networks
Fill Subject 1 credits field with 3
Leave Subject 1 score field empty
Submit calculation
Verify an inline validation error is visible for the missing grade field

title: Prevent plan generation when required fields are missing
description: Verifies the planner blocks generation and shows validation feedback when required inputs are left empty.

steps.description: Navigate to /planner
Clear any prefilled values in the planner inputs if present
Generate the plan
Verify inline validation errors are displayed for missing required fields

title: Remove a backlog item and confirm results update accordingly
description: Verifies a student can remove a previously added backlog item and rerun the scan to see outputs reflect the reduced backlog set.

steps.description: Navigate to /backlog
Add two backlog or failed course items
Run the backlog impact scan
Remove one backlog item
Run the backlog impact scan again
Verify the results reflect fewer backlog items than before

title: Prevent calculation with invalid numeric inputs
description: Verifies the calculator blocks calculation and displays validation feedback for invalid numeric inputs such as zero or negative credits.

steps.description: Navigate to /calculator
Add new subjects to the list
Fill Subject 1 name with Chemistry
Fill Subject 1 credits field with 0
Fill Subject 1 score field with 75
Submit calculation
Verify a numeric validation error is visible and results are not displayed

title: Prevent scan when no backlog items are provided
description: Verifies the backlog scanner handles the empty state by blocking the scan or showing a clear prompt when no items are entered.

steps.description: Navigate to /backlog
Ensure no backlog items exist by removing any added items if present
Run the backlog impact scan
Verify an empty-state prompt or validation message is displayed for missing backlog items

title: Reject out-of-range CGPA inputs
description: Verifies that entering an out-of-range CGPA value results in a validation error and prevents predictions from being generated.

steps.description: Navigate to /predictor
Fill an out-of-range value into the current CGPA field
Fill a valid upcoming semester credits value into the upcoming credits field
Fill a valid target CGPA into the target CGPA field
Generate the grade predictions
Verify a CGPA validation error is visible and no results are displayed

title: Reject zero or negative upcoming credits
description: Verifies that the predictor requires upcoming credits to be positive and shows a validation error for zero or negative values.

steps.description: Navigate to /predictor
Fill a valid current CGPA into the current CGPA field
Fill 0 into the upcoming credits field
Fill a valid target CGPA into the target CGPA field
Generate the grade predictions
Verify an upcoming credits validation error is visible and no results are displayed

title: View landing page highlights and stats section
description: Verifies the landing page presents the feature overview and stats section content as the user scrolls.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll through the feature highlights section
Scroll to the stats section
Verify feature highlight content is displayed
Verify stats and feature cards are displayed

title: Validate SGPA and credits inputs on semester record
description: Verifies the multi-semester form shows validation when SGPA is out of range or credits are non-positive and does not save invalid data.

steps.description: Navigate to /multi-semester
Start adding a new semester record
Fill a negative value into the credits field
Fill an out-of-range value into the SGPA field
Save the semester record
Verify input validation errors are visible and the record is not added to the list

title: Validate remaining semesters cannot be zero
description: Verifies the planner prevents generating a plan when remaining semesters is set to zero and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /planner
Fill a valid current CGPA into the current CGPA field
Fill a valid number into the completed credits field
Fill a valid target CGPA into the target CGPA field
Select 0 as the number of remaining semesters if selectable, otherwise type 0 into the remaining semesters field
Generate the plan
Verify a remaining semesters validation error is visible

title: Handle unrealistic targets above the maximum CGPA
description: Verifies that setting a target CGPA above the allowed maximum is blocked with validation feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /predictor
Fill a valid current CGPA into the current CGPA field
Fill a valid upcoming semester credits value into the upcoming credits field
Fill an out-of-range high value into the target CGPA field
Generate the grade predictions
Verify a target CGPA validation error is visible and no results are displayed

title: Validate backlog item credits must be positive
description: Verifies the backlog scanner shows validation when a backlog item has zero or negative credits and does not include it in results.

steps.description: Navigate to /backlog
Add a backlog or failed course item
Fill 0 into the credits field for the backlog item
Run the backlog impact scan
Verify a credits validation error is visible

title: Show empty state when no saved calculations exist
description: Verifies the dashboard displays an empty state when there are no saved calculations available.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Verify an empty state is visible indicating there are no saved calculations

title: Validate CGPA range in planner inputs
description: Verifies the planner shows a validation error when the user enters a CGPA value outside the allowed range.

steps.description: Navigate to /planner
Fill an out-of-range value into the current CGPA field
Fill a valid number into the completed credits field
Fill a valid target CGPA into the target CGPA field
Select a valid number of remaining semesters
Generate the plan
Verify a CGPA range validation error is visible

title: Validate credits must be positive in planner
description: Verifies the planner prevents generation when completed credits is zero or negative and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /planner
Fill a valid current CGPA into the current CGPA field
Fill 0 into the completed credits field
Fill a valid target CGPA into the target CGPA field
Select a valid number of remaining semesters
Generate the plan
Verify a credits validation error is visible
